item.quote: Slide 1. This is going to be really cool. This is going to be really cool. This is going to be really cool. This is going to be really cool. This is going to be really cool. This is going to be really cool. This is going to be really cool.
item.name: Jason Sass

item.quote: Slide 2. I think people will use this for sure. I think people will use this for sure. I think people will use this for sure. I think people will use this for sure. I think people will use this for sure.
item.attribution: - Devin Tucker / 2.08.25 / Trail Blazers vs Lakers
item.name: Devin Tucker

item.quote: Slide 3. I can't imagine life without this. I can't imagine life without this. I can't imagine life without this.
item.name: Dana Whitfield
